mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_application_form ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM project_application_form WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM project_application_form WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_application_form ( instructor_name, leader_name, leader_phone, competition_registered, competition_name, project_name, project_introduction, project_achievements, expected_outcomes, leader_declaration, leader_signature, leader_sign_date, member_declaration, member_signature, member_sign_date, instructor_opinion, instructor_signature, instructor_sign_date, status, applicant_id, applicant_name, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{instructorName}, #{leaderName}, #{leaderPhone}, #{competitionRegistered}, #{competitionName}, #{projectName}, #{projectIntroduction}, #{projectAchievements}, #{expectedOutcomes}, #{leaderDeclaration}, #{leaderSignature}, #{leaderSignDate}, #{memberDeclaration}, #{memberSignature}, #{memberSignDate}, #{instructorOpinion}, #{instructorSignature}, #{instructorSignDate}, #{status}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project_application_form SET instructor_name = #{instructorName}, leader_name = #{leaderName}, leader_phone = #{leaderPhone}, competition_registered = #{competitionRegistered}, competition_name = #{competitionName}, project_name = #{projectName}, project_introduction = #{projectIntroduction}, project_achievements = #{projectAchievements}, expected_outcomes = #{expectedOutcomes}, leader_declaration = #{leaderDeclaration}, leader_signature = #{leaderSignature}, leader_sign_date = #{leaderSignDate}, member_declaration = #{memberDeclaration}, member_signature = #{memberSignature}, member_sign_date = #{memberSignDate}, instructor_opinion = #{instructorOpinion}, instructor_signature = #{instructorSignature}, instructor_sign_date = #{instructorSignDate}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
